title: Defining functions
summary: Encodes boundary defining functions, the compactification ḡ = r²g₊, and the geodesic normalization through explicit certificate fields.

mathematicalContent.heading: Boundary defining function
mathematicalContent.body: A defining function r is positive in the interior and vanishes on the boundary. The usual nondegeneracy condition dr ≠ 0 on the boundary is present only as an uninterpreted proposition, because this layer has no differential calculus.

mathematicalContent.heading: Compactification
mathematicalContent.body: Multiplying the complete metric g₊ by r² produces the formal compactified metric ḡ.

mathematicalContent.heading: Geodesic normalization
mathematicalContent.body: For a geodesic defining function, the intended condition is that dr has unit squared norm with respect to ḡ. Lean stores the norm-squared function and the equality to one as fields; it does not derive them from a metric connection.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Packages a function r on the compactified bulk, positivity on the interior, vanishing on the embedded boundary, and a proposition intended to certify boundary nondegeneracy.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: r:\overline X\to\mathbb R,\qquad r(x)>0\ (x\in X^{\circ}),\qquad r(\iota(y))=0\ (y\in M),\qquad dr|_M\neq0
correspondence.leanType: structure DefiningFunction (X : PESpace) where r; positive_interior; zero_on_boundary; nondegenerate_boundary

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the formal compactification of g₊ determined by r.
correspondence.leanType: def compactifiedMetric (gPlus : MetricSymbol X.bulk) (r : DefiningFunction X) : MetricSymbol X.bulk

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Extends a defining function by a scalar function q intended to mean |dr|²_ḡ, a placeholder proposition linking q to that geometric norm, and the stored equation q=1 in the interior.
correspondence.leanType: structure GeodesicDefiningFunction (X : PESpace) (gPlus : MetricSymbol X.bulk) extends DefiningFunction X

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds the preceding definition: the compactification associated with the underlying defining function of r is exactly r²g₊. The proof is definitional equality.
correspondence.leanType: theorem compactification (r : GeodesicDefiningFunction X gPlus) : compactifiedMetric gPlus r.toDefiningFunction = scaleByFunction (fun x => (r.r x)^2) gPlus

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: At every interior point, returns the geodesic normalization equation stored in the GeodesicDefiningFunction data.
correspondence.leanType: theorem normSqGradient_eq_one (r : GeodesicDefiningFunction X gPlus) (hx : x in X.interior) : r.normSqGradientCompactified x = 1

references.note: Background for defining functions, geodesic normalizations, and conformal compactification.

limitations: This module records the conditions as structure fields. The propositions nondegenerate_boundary and gradient_certificate have no geometric interpretation in Lean yet, and normSqGradientCompactified is not computed from r and ḡ.
